args: ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; case "$ROOT" in ''|*'$'*) ROOT="";; esac; for CANDIDATE in "$ROOT" "$(dirname "$(dirname "$0")")" "$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/remote1993/ccx-mem/plugin"; do [ -n "$CANDIDATE" ] && [ -f "$CANDIDATE/scripts/mcp-server.cjs" ] && exec bun "$CANDIDATE/scripts/mcp-server.cjs"; done; echo 'ccx-mem mcp-server.cjs not found' >&2; exit 1
